sub_modules.nr_poly_eval_cubic: Combinational fixed-point Horner evaluator for the cubic polynomial p(x).
sub_modules.nr_derivative_eval_cubic: Combinational fixed-point Horner evaluator for the cubic derivative p'(x).
sub_modules.nr_newton_step: Combinational Newton-Raphson update block using extended-width fixed-point division.
sub_modules.nr_root_verify: Combinational verification block that checks whether |p(root)| is within tolerance.
sub_modules.nr_saturate_signed: Combinational signed saturation helper for narrowing extended results to output width.
